assertions.title: Circulating supply chart rolling window returns named series payload

steps.expected: Named series payload with 'circulating_supply' key containing [timestamp, value] pairs
steps.observed: Response contains {'circulating_supply': [...]} with chronologically ordered samples

assertions.title: Circulating supply chart samples are chronologically ordered

steps.action: Verify timestamps in circulating supply chart response
steps.expected: Timestamps are in ascending chronological order
steps.observed: All timestamp values increase sequentially from first to last sample

assertions.title: Circulating supply chart range returns named series payload

steps.observed: Response contains {'circulating_supply': []} (empty for this range, but structure correct)

assertions.title: Circulating supply chart range endpoints stay within requested bounds

steps.expected: All returned timestamps within [from, to] bounds
steps.observed: Empty array returned - no data in range, no out-of-bounds samples

evidence.notes: Range request accepted, returned empty array (no data for requested period)

assertions.title: Total supply chart rolling window returns named series payload

steps.expected: Named series payload with 'total_supply' key containing [timestamp, value] pairs

assertions.title: Total supply chart samples are chronologically ordered

steps.action: Verify timestamps in total supply chart response
steps.expected: Timestamps are in ascending chronological order

assertions.title: Total supply chart range returns named series payload

steps.observed: Response contains {'total_supply': []} (empty for this range, but structure correct)

assertions.title: Total supply chart range endpoints stay within requested bounds

steps.expected: All returned timestamps within [from, to] bounds
steps.observed: Empty array returned - no data in range, no out-of-bounds samples

evidence.notes: Range request accepted, returned empty array (no data for requested period)

assertions.title: Bad parameters are explicitly rejected for supply chart endpoints

steps.expected: 400 Bad Request with explicit error message

steps.action: GET circulating_supply_chart with invalid days value
steps.expected: 400 Bad Request with explicit error message

steps.action: GET circulating_supply_chart/range with malformed from value
steps.expected: 400 Bad Request with explicit error message
400 Bad Request with explicit error message

steps.action: GET circulating_supply_chart with invalid interval parameter
steps.expected: 400 Bad Request with explicit error message

steps.action: GET total_supply_chart with invalid interval parameter
steps.expected: 400 Bad Request with explicit error message

summary: Tested 9 assertions: All 9 passed. Supply chart endpoints correctly return named series payloads with chronologically ordered samples, range endpoints respect bounds, and bad parameters are explicitly rejected with 400 status and clear error messages.
